location: Dropped by a Deathbird enemy that spawns only at night on a hilltop east of the Hermit Merchant's Shack in the Capital Outskirts area of Altus Plateau, near a Minor Erdtree, alongside a cluster of Skeletal Snails.
tactics: This Deathbird only appears at night — rest at a grace and wait for nightfall if it's daytime, or use the in-game time-skip item.
Deathbirds hit hard and fly erratically; stay mobile and bait its dive/peck attacks rather than trading in the open.
The accompanying Skeletal Snails are slow but can poison-build if ignored — clear them first or lure the bird away from the group.
lore: A shield vividly painted with a twinbird, said to be the envoy of an outer god and the mother of all Deathbirds — it rewards desperate last stands, boosting attack and defense when the wielder's health runs critically low.

builds.name: Aggressive low-HP Strength build
builds.why: Passive +5% attack/+10% negation below 20% HP rewards a glass-cannon playstyle that dips into critical health, pairs well with health-regen talismans.
